zh_text: 电梯维保人员必须经过专门的技术培训和安全操作培训，经过市质量技术监督局认定的考核部门考核合格，取得相应资格证书，才能上岗操作。
en_text: Only the elevator maintenance personnel having received specific training in technology and safety operation, who are qualified as assessed by the Assessment Department designated by the Municipal Bureau of Quality and Technical Supervision and have obtained the corresponding qualification certificate, can take the post to operate.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯维保人员必须熟悉和掌握起重、电工、钳工、电梯驾驶等理论知识和实际操作技术，熟悉高空作业、防火、电焊、气焊、现场触电急救等安全知识。
en_text: The elevator maintenance personnel must be familiar with and master the theoretical knowledge and practical operating technology concerning hoisting, electrical engineering, bench work, elevator driving, etc., and be familiar with the safety acknowledge concerning aerial work, fire prevention, electro-welding, gas welding, on-site first aid for electric shock, etc.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯维保人员必须熟悉电梯安装、维修保养工艺的要求。
en_text: The elevator maintenance personnel must be familiar with the requirements on the processes of elevator installation and maintenance.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯维保人员应遵守各项安全操作规程，正确使用个人劳防用品，工作时至少有两人。
en_text: The elevator maintenance personnel shall strictly observe all safety operation procedures and properly use personal labor protective supplies. There shall be at least two persons working together.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯维保人员应有充分的休息，工作中保持良好的精神状态，做到劳逸结合，严禁酒后上岗。
en_text: The elevator maintenance personnel shall have sufficient rest, keep a good mental state, and alternate work with rest. It is strictly forbidden to work after drinking.

en_text: Cancel the door-opening function; in the machine room call the car to the bottom / top landing with rated speed once, and then within the car drive the elevator with rated speed once again. Only without any abnormality can the elevator resume normal service.

en_text: Resume the STOP switch of emergency power-off leveling device, then it is under the normal operation condition (if any).
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 机房环境及安全设施检查
en_text: Checking of Machine Room Environment and Safety Device
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 机房应有良好的通风，无潮气，确保机房温度在5～40℃之间。
en_text: The machine room shall be well ventilated without humidity, and the machine-room temperature between 5℃ and 40℃ shall be ensured.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 当环境最高温度为40℃时，空气相对湿度不能超过50% ，在较低温度下可有较高的相对湿度，月平均最低温度不高于+25℃，该月的月平均最大相对湿度不超过90% 。
en_text: When the maximum environment temperature reaches 40℃, the relative air humidity must not exceed 50%. Higher relative humidity is allowed at lower temperature. The monthly average minimum temperature shall not exceed +25℃, and the monthly average maximum relative humidity of this month shall not exceed 90%.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认机房永久性电气照明设施完好，开关正常，确保地面上的照度不小于200 lx。
en_text: Confirm that the permanently installed electric lighting in the machine room is intact and the switches are in normal state, and ensure that the intensity of illumination at floor level is not less than 200 lx.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 机房无油污，地面要保持无尘。
en_text: No greasy dirt in the machine room, and its ground shall be kept dustless.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 机房内平均噪声值不大于80dB(A)。
en_text: The average noise value in the machine room shall not exceed 80 dB(A).
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 避免阳光直接照射在主机、控制柜等设备上，如果发生需采取遮光措施，如装设窗帘等。
en_text: It shall avoid the machine, controller and other devices from direct sunshine, and for the occurrence of direct sunshine the sun-shading measures shall be taken, such as the installation of curtain.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认机房内未放置与电梯无关的设备和杂物，未存放易燃易爆的化学性物质。
en_text: Confirm that no devices or sundries irrelevant to elevator are placed in the machine room, and no flammable or explosive chemicals are stored in the machine room.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认机房门窗完好，门锁安全可靠，机房门上标有“机房重地，闲人免进”字样。
en_text: Confirm that the door and window of machine room are intact, the door lock is safe and reliable, and the notice of "Machine Room, Authorized Personnel Only" is labeled on the machine room door.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认通往机房的通道畅通，永久性电气照明设施完好，地面上的照度不小于50 lx。
en_text: Confirm that there is no obstruction on the access to machine room, the permanently installed electric lighting is intact and the intensity of illumination at floor level is not less than 50 lx.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认在机房的转动部件（如曳引轮、限速器等）上有明显的与轿厢升降方向相对应的转动方向标志，且标志清晰。
en_text: Confirm that obvious signs of the rotation direction corresponding to the car movement direction are marked on the rotating components (such as traction sheave and overspeed governor) in the machine room, and these signs shall be legible.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认松闸扳手、盘车手轮放置在机房内容易接近的明显部位，松闸扳手为红色，盘车手轮为黄色，盘车手轮上有与轿厢升降方向相对应的转动方向标志。
en_text: Confirm that the brake releasing wrench and handwheel are placed in the obvious places of machine room where are easy to access, with the brake releasing wrench in red color and handwheel in yellow; signs of the rotation direction corresponding to the car movement direction shall be marked on the handwheel.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 机房内有两台以上设备时，确认在每台设备的部件、配电箱上都有设备标识编号。
en_text: When there are more than two devices in the machine room, confirm that the device identification No. is labeled on the components and distribution box of each device.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认在易于看到的地方贴有《有机房电梯救援流程图》和平层标识说明等。
en_text: Confirm that the Rescue Flow Chart of Elevator with Machine Room and instructions for leveling symbols are labeled in conspicuous positions.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

en_text: Confirm that in the machine room the emergency rescue devices are intact, and chain hoist, jack, etc. are reliable and effective.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

en_text: Confirm that in the machine room the fire-fighting equipment is intact, and the fire extinguisher provided is dry-medical or other insulated fire extinguishers, which shall be within the valid date and has no damage.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

en_text: The headroom shall be provided with dry-chemical or other insulated fire extinguishers, which shall be within the valid date and has no damage.

zh_text: 曳引机
en_text: Traction Machine
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认曳引机运行平稳，无异常振动和声响。
en_text: Confirm that the operation of traction machine is stable, without abnormal vibration or sound.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查并测试主机座安全保护开关（如果有），开关应有效，动作完好。
en_text: Check and test the safety protection switch (if any) for the machine base, which shall be effective and operates well.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查并测试主机停止开关（如果有），动作后应能停止电梯运行。
en_text: Check and test the stopping switch (if any) for the machine, which shall be able to stop the elevator traveling upon its operation.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 以下工作必须在电梯断电后进行。
en_text: The following work cannot be carried out until the de-energization of elevator.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 清洁曳引机，整体外表无灰尘，主机铭牌应清晰可见。
en_text: Clean the traction machine so that there is no dust on its overall surface and the machine data plate shall be plainly visible.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 用检验锤敲击检查曳引机及底座固定螺栓，安装紧固无松动，如有松动立即拧紧。
en_text: Via knocking with the testing hammer check the fixing bolts for traction machine and machine base, which shall be installed securely without looseness, and any loosened one shall be tightened.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查曳引机减震橡胶垫，压力均匀，无老化现象。
en_text: Check the damping rubber pads of traction machine, which shall have pressure evenly distributed without aging.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查曳引机转动部件（如曳引轮等）的防护罩是否安装牢固，转动部件应涂黄漆。
en_text: Check whether the protective covers for rotating components (such as traction sheave) of the traction machine are installed firmly, and yellow paint shall be applied to the rotating components.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查曳引轮上的钢丝绳防跳装置是否安装牢固，防跳装置距钢丝绳距离在3～5mm范围内，且不大于钢丝绳直径的1/2。
en_text: Check whether the anti-rebound device for the rope on traction sheave is installed firmly. The distance between the anti-rebound device and the rope shall be within 3-5 mm and not exceed 1/2 of the rope diameter.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 清洁编码器，并确认其安装牢固，接线紧固。
en_text: Clean the encoder and confirm that it is installed firmly with secure wiring.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认曳引轮槽内清洁、无严重油污，必要时可用清洁剂清除绳槽内的油污。
en_text: Confirm that it is clean inside the traction sheave groove without heavy greasy dirt. If necessary, cleaning agents can be used to remove the greasy dirt from the rope groove.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查曳引轮下方是否有摩擦下来的金属屑，如发现金属屑，需进一步测量绳槽的磨损情况（如图4.1）。
en_text: Check whether any metal filing caused by friction exists under the traction sheave; if any metal filing is found, it needs to further measure the wear condition of traction sheave (as shown in Figure 4.1).
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 制动器
en_text: Brake
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查、清洁制动器及铭牌，确认制动器各紧固螺栓无松动，铭牌清晰可见。
en_text: Check and clean the brake and the data plate; confirm that each fastening bolt for the brake is tightened, and the data plate is plainly visible.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查手动松闸装置，确认其功能正常，安全有效。
en_text: Check the manual brake releasing device to confirm that its function is normal, safe and effective.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查制动器开关，功能正常，动作可靠。
en_text: Check the brake switch, which shall function normally and operate reliably.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查制动器张开、闭合时的声音是否正常。
en_text: Check whether the sound produced at opening or closing of the brake is normal.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 限速器及张紧装置
en_text: Overspeed Governor and Tensioning Device
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认限速器及张紧轮（在底坑）运行时无异常声响。
en_text: Confirm that there is no abnormal sound occurring during the operation of overspeed governor and tensioning pulley (in the pit).
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 以下工作必须在电梯断电后进行。
en_text: The following work cannot be carried out until the elevator is de-energized.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查铭牌，确保铭牌速度和电梯速度一致，日期在安全校验有效期内。
en_text: Check the data plate to make sure that the speed on the data plate is consistent with the elevator speed and the date is within the effective date of safety inspection.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 清洁限速器及张紧装置，外观无灰尘油腻，转动部件应涂黄漆。
en_text: Clean the dust and greasy dirt off the surfaces of overspeed governor and tensioning device, and yellow paint shall be applied to the rotating components.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查限速器绳轮、张紧轮（在底坑）是否有裂纹和绳槽磨损情况。
en_text: Check whether there are cracks on the overspeed governor rope pulley or tensioning pulley (in the pit) as well as the wear condition of rope groove.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认限速器绳有效张紧且状态良好，能可靠驱动限速器绳轮。
en_text: Confirm that the overspeed-governor rope is tensioned effectively and in good condition, and that it can drive the governor rope pulley reliably.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查限速器钢丝绳的磨损和断丝情况，断丝的数目必须在规定的范围内。
en_text: Check the wear and broken wires of overspeed governor rope, and that the number of broken wires must be within the specified range.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

en_text: The lubricating oil inside the rail oil collector shall be absorbed into the specialized oil bucket and then be disposed collectively as per the procedures of maintenance unit, and notice that this shall comply with the local environmental protection regulations.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

zh_text: 检查补偿链与对重防护栏是否干涉，补偿链外层橡胶皮的磨损情况，所有链节能灵活地转动，圆滑地穿过底坑补偿链导向装置，运行时无明显摆动。
en_text: Check whether the compensation chain interferes with the counterweight guard, the wear condition of outer rubber of compensation chain, and that all chain links can rotate flexibly, and smoothly pass through the guiding device for compensation chain in the pit without obvious swing during elevator running.

project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

en_text: The polyurethane buffer shall be avoided from being continuously used in an environment where the temperature exceeds 50℃ and being in continuous contact with water, and the buffer surface shall not be stained with substances such as water, oil, acid, and alkali.

zh_text: 如果钢丝绳的运行时间超过一定年限，可能会由于磨损、润滑油挤出等原因带来结构伸长，如此时钢丝绳其它状态仍然良好，则可以采用截绳并重新制作端接装置的方法来调整钢丝绳的长度；否则应考虑更换钢丝绳。
en_text: If the running time of the rope exceeds a certain number of years, structural elongation may be caused by factors such as wear and lubricant extrusion. If at this time the other aspects of the rope are still in good condition, the rope length can be adjusted via cutting the rope and re-making rope termination device; otherwise, replacing the rope shall be considered.

en_text: When the elevator has been running for 50,000 times or 3 months for the first time (according to the earlier one), upon replacement of the rope pulley or when the elevator is in abnormal situation (e.g. the comfortableness of car movement becomes worse, the rope vibration and noise increase, etc.), it is required to measure and adjust the rope tension.

zh_text: 将绳头末端的开口销（或扣紧螺母）拆除，并旋松绳头锁紧螺母，最好多旋一些；
en_text: Remove the cotter pin (or tight nut) at the end of rope hitch, unscrew the locknut for rope hitch, and it is best to unscrew it a little more;
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 将仪器的连接螺母与绳头拉杆连接，并旋动仪器套管（也就是旋动连接螺母），使仪器与绳头拉杆完全连接；
en_text: Connect the connection nut for instrument to the rope hitch rod, and rotate the instrument sleeve (i.e. rotating the connection nut), to enable the instrument to be completely connected to the rope hitch rod;
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 旋动仪器上的调整螺母，使套管刚好碰到弹簧座；
en_text: Rotate the adjusting nut on the instrument to enable the sleeve to be just touching the spring seat;
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 用手指朝松动的方向旋动绳头调整螺母（由于螺母受力，用手是旋不动的）；另一只手使用扳手，将位于仪器顶部的调整螺母朝旋紧的方向，慢慢拧动。
en_text: Via fingers of one hand try rotating the adjusting nut for rope hitch in the direction of loosening (but as the nut is stressed, the nut cannot be rotated via hand), then with wrench in the other hand slowly rotate the adjusting nut at top of the instrument in the direction of tightening.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 一旦感觉到绳头调整螺母松动，立即停止旋动扳手。
en_text: Once the adjusting nut for rope hitch appears to be loosened, immediately stop turning the wrench.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

en_text: If the surface is in good condition, just wipe it with a clean rag; if the surface is contaminated with heavy greasy dirt, it shall be cleaned with the S4 oil specified by our company, and the re-lubrication shall be carried out upon natural air-drying of the grease.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 严禁使用汽油、煤油或其他有机溶剂清洁钢丝绳。
en_text: Gasoline, kerosene or other organic solvents are forbidden to be used to clean ropes.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 再润滑作业
en_text: Re-lubrication work
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 在机房（有机房电梯）或轿顶（无机房电梯）进行再润滑作业。
en_text: Carry out the re-lubrication work in the machine room (for elevator with machine room) or on the car roof (for machine-room-less elevator).
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯以检修速度（慢速）运行，在绳轮的钢丝绳出绳侧，用毛刷或油漆辊对钢丝绳进行再润滑。
en_text: Move the elevator at inspection speed (slow speed), and re-lubricate the rope with a brush or paint roller at the rope-guide frame side of the rope pulley.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 严禁在正常运行速度下再润滑钢丝绳。
en_text: It is strictly forbidden to re-lubricate the rope when the elevator is running at normal speed.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 为防止被卷入绳槽以及润滑油滴落到制动器工作面的风险，只能在远离曳引轮且钢丝绳出离绳轮的方向进行再润滑。
en_text: To avoid the risk of being rolled into rope groove and the risk of the lubricating oil being dropped into the working surface of brake, the re-lubrication can only be carried out in the position away from the traction sheave and in the direction where the rope departs from the rope pulley.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 再润滑后电梯运行特性的检查
en_text: Inspecting the elevator traveling characteristics upon re-lubrication
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 再润滑之后，应根据油脂的具体情况来决定是否需要2-3个小时的自然风干，才能将电梯恢复到正常运行。
en_text: Upon re-lubrication, whether natural air drying for 2-3 hours is needed shall be determined according to the specific condition of grease prior to resetting the elevator to normal service.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 但是无论如何，都需要检查钢丝绳的滑移特性。
en_text: But in any case, the slipping characteristics of rope shall be inspected.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 如果钢丝绳滑移量超标，则延长风干的时间；或者用干净的抹布轻轻将多余的油脂擦除，直至滑移特性满足要求才能将电梯恢复正常使用。
en_text: If the rope slippage exceeds the standard, the drying time shall be extended; or wipe the redundant grease gently with a clean rag, and the elevator cannot resume the normal operation until the slipping characteristics meet the requirement.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 滑移特性的检查：
en_text: Inspection of slipping characteristics:
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 润滑前钢丝绳滑移量的标记
en_text: Marking of the rope slippage before lubrication
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 将电梯运行到顶/底层后，用记号笔在钢丝绳和曳引轮上划上一条记号线；然后以正常速度往返运行电梯一次。
en_text: Upon running the elevator to the top / bottom landing, draw a marking line on the rope and the traction sheave with a marking pen; and then run the elevator for a round trip at normal speed.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 测量钢丝绳上记号线与曳引轮上记号线的距离S0，即为初始滑移量。
en_text: Measure the distance S0 between the marking line on the rope and the marking line on the traction sheave, which is the initial slippage.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 若S0≤50mm，则钢丝绳的初始滑移量符合要求，否则应立即汇报上级主管。
en_text: If S0 ≤ 50 mm, then the initial slippage of the rope meets the requirement; otherwise, it shall be reported to the higher authority immediately.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 润滑后钢丝绳滑移量的测量
en_text: Measuring the rope slippage upon lubrication
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 测量钢丝绳相对于曳引轮的滑移量并记录S1。
en_text: Measure the slippage between the rope and the traction sheave and record it as S1.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 若S1≤2S0，则钢丝绳的滑移特性符合要求，否则钢丝绳可能由于润滑油太多，造成过度打滑。
en_text: If S1 ≤ 2S0, then the slipping characteristics of the rope meet the requirement, otherwise, it may cause excessive slipping of the rope due to too much lubricating oil.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 此时，应延长钢丝绳表面润滑油风干的时间，或用干净抹布轻轻擦拭多余的油脂。
en_text: In this case, air drying time of lubricating oil on the rope surface shall be extended, or gently wipe the excessive grease with a clean rag.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 再润滑作业时，切忌将润滑油滴落在其它电梯设备上，特别是制动器工作面；否则应立即擦拭干净，并在电梯投入运行前再次确认制动器工作面无任何油污。
en_text: When carrying out the re-lubrication work, remember not to drop the lubricating oil onto other elevator equipment, especially onto the working surface of the brake; otherwise, it shall be wiped immediately and reconfirm there is not any oil stain on the working surface of the brake before the elevator restores to normal operation.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 钢丝绳绳头组合的维保
en_text: Maintenance of Rope Hitch
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 确认钢丝绳绳头组合安全可靠，每个绳头均装有双螺母对顶拧紧，并在尾端装有开口销。
en_text: Confirm that the rope hitches are safe and reliable, each rope hitch shall be provided with double nuts that are tightened up together, and the end of each rope hitch shall be provided with cotter pin.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查钢丝绳绳头弹性元件完好（如弹簧是否有裂纹、严重锈蚀、永久变形等，弹性橡胶是否有龟裂、老化、塑性变形等缺陷），且未被完全压缩。
en_text: Check whether the rope-hitch elastic elements are in good condition (e.g. whether there are cracks, severe corrosions, permanent deformation, etc. on the spring and whether there are defects like fracturing, aging, plastic deformation on the elastic rubber) and are not completely compressed.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 检查防扭转钢丝绳是否完好。
en_text: Check whether the anti-twist rope is in good condition.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 更换绳头组合时，各弹性元件型号需与原型号保持一致，以免造成电梯运行的异常振动；当更换整套绳头组合时，建议所有绳头组合一起更换成与原设计相同的型号。
en_text: When replacing the rope hitch, the type of each elastic component shall be consistent with the original type to avoid abnormal vibration during elevator running; when replacing the whole set of rope hitch, it is suggested that all rope hitches shall be replaced with the same type as the original design.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx

zh_text: 电梯维保人员必须熟悉本台电梯的机械构造、性能要求。懂得电气原理图，并能排除机械和电气两方面的常见故障，以及具有故障应急处理的能力。
en_text: The elevator maintenance personnel must be familiar with the mechanical construction and performance requirements of this Elevator, and shall be capable of interpreting the electrical schematic diagram and troubleshooting common faults in both mechanical and electrical aspects, and shall have the ability of processing emergency faults.
project_name: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_

metadata.source_path: C:\Users\30056638\PycharmProjects\PythonProject_translateagent\tmx\551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
metadata.source_file: 551 R000093436c_tk meta100 MR&MRL 客梯维保手册 (机械部分)_.tmx
